English: 

ya1.1.2:0.2
Pali: 1.1 Uddesa 
English: 

ya1.1.2:0.3
Pali: 1.1.2. Hetuvārādiuddesa 
English: 

ya1.1.2:1.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalahetū …pe… kusalanidānā …pe… kusalasambhavā …pe… kusalappabhavā …pe… kusalasamuṭṭhānā …pe… kusalāhārā …pe… kusalārammaṇā …pe… kusalapaccayā …pe… kusalasamudayā …pe…. 
English: 

ya1.1.2:2.1
Pali: Mūlaṁ hetu nidānañca, 
English: 

ya1.1.2:2.2
Pali: Sambhavo pabhavena ca; 
English: 

ya1.1.2:2.3
Pali: Samuṭṭhānāhārārammaṇā, 
English: 

ya1.1.2:2.4
Pali: Paccayo samudayena cāti. 
English: 

ya1.1.2:3.1
Pali: Uddesavāro niṭṭhito. 
English:

ya1.2.1
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya1/ya1.2.1_root-pli-ms.json

ya1.2.1:0.1
Pali: 1 Mūlayamaka 
English: 

ya1.2.1:0.2
Pali: 1.2 Niddesa 
English: 

ya1.2.1:0.3
Pali: 1.2.1. Mūlavāraniddesa 
English: 

ya1.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 1.2.1.1. Kusalapada nayacatukka 
English: 

ya1.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 1.2.1.1.1. Mūlanaya 
English: 

ya1.2.1:1.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlāti? Tīṇeva kusalamūlāni. Avasesā kusalā dhammā na kusalamūlā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:2.1
Pali: Ye vā pana kusalamūlā, sabbe te dhammā kusalāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:3.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlena ekamūlāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:4.1
Pali: Ye vā pana kusalamūlena ekamūlā, sabbe te dhammā kusalāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:5.1
Pali: Kusalasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ kusalamūlena ekamūlaṁ, na kusalaṁ. Kusalaṁ kusalamūlena ekamūlañceva kusalañca. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:6.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalamūlena ekamūlā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlena aññamaññamūlāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:7.1
Pali: Mūlāni yāni ekato uppajjanti kusalamūlāni ekamūlāni ceva aññamaññamūlāni ca. Avasesā kusalamūlasahajātā dhammā kusalamūlena ekamūlā, na ca aññamaññamūlā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:8.1
Pali: Ye vā pana kusalamūlena aññamaññamūlā, sabbe te dhammā kusalāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:9.0
Pali: 1.2.1.1.2. Mūlamūlanaya 
English: 

ya1.2.1:9.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlamūlāti? Tīṇeva kusalamūlamūlāni. Avasesā kusalā dhammā na kusalamūlamūlā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:10.1
Pali: Ye vā pana kusalamūlamūlā, sabbe te dhammā kusalāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:11.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlena ekamūlamūlāti? Āmantā.

English: 

ya1.2.1:14.1

English: 

ya1.2.1:15.1
Pali: Mūlāni yāni ekato uppajjanti kusalamūlāni ekamūlamūlāni ceva aññamaññamūlamūlāni ca. Avasesā kusalamūlasahajātā dhammā kusalamūlena ekamūlamūlā, na ca aññamaññamūlamūlā.

ya1.2.1:23.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalamūlena ekamūlakā dhammā, sabbe te kusalamūlena aññamaññamūlakāti?

Pali: Ye keci nāmamūlena ekamūlakā dhammā, sabbe te nāmamūlena aññamaññamūlakāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:142.1
Pali: Mūlāni yāni ekato uppajjanti nāmamūlāni ekamūlakāni ceva aññamaññamūlakāni ca. Avasesā nāmamūlasahajātā dhammā nāmamūlena ekamūlakā, na ca aññamaññamūlakā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:143.1
Pali: Ye vā pana nāmamūlena aññamaññamūlakā, sabbe te dhammā nāmāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:144.0
Pali: 1.2.1.4.4. Mūlamūlakanaya 
English: 

ya1.2.1:144.1
Pali: Ye keci nāmā dhammā, sabbe te nāmamūlamūlakāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:145.1
Pali: Ahetukaṁ nāmaṁ na nāmamūlamūlakaṁ. Sahetukaṁ nāmaṁ nāmamūlamūlakaṁ. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:146.1
Pali: Ye vā pana nāmamūlamūlakā, sabbe te dhammā nāmāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:147.1
Pali: Nāmasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ nāmamūlamūlakaṁ, na nāmaṁ. Nāmaṁ nāmamūlamūlakañceva nāmañca. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:148.1
Pali: Ye keci nāmā dhammā, sabbe te nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:149.1
Pali: Ahetukaṁ nāmaṁ nāmamūlena na ekamūlamūlakaṁ. Sahetukaṁ nāmaṁ nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakaṁ. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:150.1
Pali: Ye vā pana nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakā, sabbe te dhammā nāmāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:151.1
Pali: Nāmasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakaṁ, na nāmaṁ. Nāmaṁ nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakañceva nāmañca. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:152.1
Pali: Ye keci nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakā dhammā, sabbe te nāmamūlena aññamaññamūlamūlakāti? 
English: 

ya1.2.1:153.1
Pali: Mūlāni yāni ekato uppajjanti nāmamūlāni ekamūlamūlakāni ceva aññamaññamūlamūlakāni ca. Avasesā nāmamūlasahajātā dhammā nāmamūlena ekamūlamūlakā, na ca aññamaññamūlamūlakā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:154.1
Pali: Ye vā pana nāmamūlena aññamaññamūlamūlakā, sabbe te dhammā nāmāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya1.2.1:155.1
Pali: Mūlavāraniddeso.

Pali: 1.2.2. Hetuvārādiniddesa 
English: 

ya1.2.2:1.1
Pali: Ye keci kusalā dhammā, sabbe te kusalahetūti … ? 
English: 

ya1.2.2:2.1
Pali: Tayoeva kusalahetū, avasesā kusalā dhammā na kusalahetū …pe… kusalanidānā … kusalasambhavā … kusalappabhavā … kusalasamuṭṭhānā … kusalāhārā … kusalārammaṇā … kusalapaccayā … kusalasamudayā …. 
English: 

ya1.2.2:3.1
Pali: Ye keci akusalā dhammā … ye keci abyākatā dhammā … ye keci nāmā dhammā, sabbe te nāmahetūti … nāmanidānā … nāmasambhavā … nāmappabhavā … nāmasamuṭṭhānā … nāmāhārā … nāmārammaṇā … nāmapaccayā … nāmasamudayā …. 
English: 

ya1.2.2:4.1
Pali: Mūlaṁ hetu nidānañca, 
English: 

ya1.2.2:4.2
Pali: Sambhavo pabhavena ca; 
English: 

ya1.2.2:4.3
Pali: Samuṭṭhānāhārārammaṇā, 
English: 

ya1.2.2:4.4
Pali: Paccayo samudayena cāti. 
English: 

ya1.2.2:5.1
Pali: Niddesavāro niṭṭhito. 
English: 

ya1.2.2:6.1
Pali: Mūlayamakapāḷi niṭṭhitā. 
English:

ya2.1.2:1.1
Pali: Rūpaṁ rūpakkhandhoti? 
English: 

ya2.1.2:2.1
Pali: Piyarūpaṁ sātarūpaṁ rūpaṁ, na rūpakkhandho. Rūpakkhandho rūpañceva rūpakkhandho ca. 
English: 

ya2.1.2:3.1

ya2.1.2:7.1

ya2.1.2:8.1

Pali: Na rūpakkhandho na rūpanti? 
English: 

ya2.1.2:16.1
Pali: Piyarūpaṁ sātarūpaṁ na rūpakkhandho, rūpaṁ. Rūpañca rūpakkhandhañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva rūpaṁ na ca rūpakkhandho.

ya2.2.1
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya2/ya2.2.1_root-pli-ms.json

ya2.2.1:0.1
Pali: 2 Khandhayamaka 
English: 

ya2.2.1:0.2
Pali: 2.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya2.2.1:0.3
Pali: 2.2.1. Uppādavāra 
English: 

ya2.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 2.2.1.1 Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya2.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 2.2.1.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya2.2.1:1.1
Pali: Yassa rūpakkhandho uppajjati tassa vedanākkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:2.1
Pali: Asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpakkhandho uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ vedanākkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya2.2.1:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vedanākkhandho uppajjati tassa rūpakkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:4.1
Pali: Arūpaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ vedanākkhandho uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ rūpakkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya2.2.1:5.0
Pali: 2.2.1.1.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.1:5.1
Pali: Yattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati tattha vedanākkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:6.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati, no ca tattha vedanākkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya2.2.1:7.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana vedanākkhandho uppajjati tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:8.1
Pali: Arūpe tattha vedanākkhandho uppajjati, no ca tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya2.2.1:9.0
Pali: 2.2.1.1.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.1:9.1
Pali: Yassa yattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati tassa tattha vedanākkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:10.1
Pali: Asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya2.2.1:11.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vedanākkhandho uppajjati tassa tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.1:12.1

Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ vedanākkhandho uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ saññākkhandho uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ vedanākkhandho ca uppajjati saññākkhandho ca uppajjissati. 
English:

ya2.2.2:1.1
Pali: Yassa rūpakkhandho nirujjhati tassa vedanākkhandho nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:2.1
Pali: Asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpakkhandho nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ vedanākkhandho nirujjhati. Pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpakkhandho ca nirujjhati vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya2.2.2:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vedanākkhandho nirujjhati tassa rūpakkhandho nirujjhatīti?

Pali: Yassa yattha rūpakkhandho na nirujjhati tassa tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:20.1
Pali: Arūpā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho ca na nirujjhati vedanākkhandho ca na nirujjhati. 
English:

Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhissati tassa tattha rūpakkhandho nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:106.1
Pali: Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho nirujjhati. Pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhissati rūpakkhandho ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya2.2.2:107.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhati tassa tattha saññākkhandho nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:108.1
Pali: Parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhati saññākkhandho ca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya2.2.2:109.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha saññākkhandho nirujjhissati tassa tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:110.1
Pali: Catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhati. Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho ca nirujjhissati vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhati. 
English:

English:

Pali: 2.2.2.6.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.2:146.1
Pali: Yassa yattha rūpakkhandho na nirujjhittha tassa tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.2:147.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho na nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ arūpe parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho ca na nirujjhittha, vedanākkhandho ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya2.2.2:148.1

Pali: 2.2.3.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya2.2.3:1.1
Pali: Yassa rūpakkhandho uppajjati tassa vedanākkhandho nirujjhatīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:2.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vedanākkhandho nirujjhati tassa rūpakkhandho uppajjatīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:3.1
Pali: Yassa vedanākkhandho uppajjati tassa saññākkhandho nirujjhatīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:4.1

English: 

ya2.2.3:5.0
Pali: 2.2.3.1.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.3:5.1
Pali: Yattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:6.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati, no ca tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhati. Pañcavokāre tattha rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:7.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana vedanākkhandho nirujjhati tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:8.1
Pali: Arūpe tattha vedanākkhandho nirujjhati, no ca tattha rūpakkhandho uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha vedanākkhandho ca nirujjhati rūpakkhandho ca uppajjati. 
English:

Pali: 2.2.3.6.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya2.2.3:132.1
Pali: Yassa rūpakkhandho nuppajjittha tassa vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:133.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissati tassa rūpakkhandho nuppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:134.1
Pali: Yassa vedanākkhandho nuppajjittha tassa saññākkhandho na nirujjhissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:135.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana saññākkhandho na nirujjhissati tassa vedanākkhandho nuppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:136.0
Pali: 2.2.3.6.5. Paccanīkaokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.3:136.1
Pali: Yattha rūpakkhandho nuppajjittha …pe…. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:137.0
Pali: 2.2.3.6.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya2.2.3:137.1
Pali: Yassa yattha rūpakkhandho nuppajjittha tassa tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:138.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ arūpe parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho ca nuppajjittha vedanākkhandho ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:139.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissati tassa tattha rūpakkhandho nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:140.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpakkhandho nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ arūpe parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho ca na nirujjhissati rūpakkhandho ca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:141.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vedanākkhandho nuppajjittha tassa tattha saññākkhandho na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:142.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho na nirujjhissati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho ca nuppajjittha saññākkhandho ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:143.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha saññākkhandho na nirujjhissati tassa tattha vedanākkhandho nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya2.2.3:144.1
Pali: Parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vedanākkhandho nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha saññākkhandho ca na nirujjhissati vedanākkhandho ca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:145.1
Pali: Uppādanirodhavāro. 
English: 

ya2.2.3:146.1
Pali: Pavattivāro niṭṭhito. 
English:

ya2.3.4
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya2/ya2.3.4_root-pli-ms.json

ya2.3.4:0.1
Pali: 2 Khandhayamaka 
English: 

ya2.3.4:0.2
Pali: 2.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya2.3.4:0.3
Pali: 2.3.4. Paccuppannātītavāra 
English: 

ya2.3.4:1.1
Pali: Yo rūpakkhandhaṁ parijānāti so vedanākkhandhaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya2.3.4:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana vedanākkhandhaṁ parijānittha so rūpakkhandhaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.3.4:3.1
Pali: Yo rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānāti so vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya2.3.4:4.1
Pali: Arahā rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānāti, no ca vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānittha. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā rūpakkhandhañca na parijānanti vedanākkhandhañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya2.3.4:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānittha so rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya2.3.4:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānittha, no ca rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānāti. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā vedanākkhandhañca na parijānittha rūpakkhandhañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

================================================================================
ya2.3.5
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya2/ya2.3.5_root-pli-ms.json

ya2.3.5:0.1
Pali: 2 Khandhayamaka 
English: 

ya2.3.5:0.2
Pali: 2.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya2.3.5:0.3
Pali: 2.3.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya2.3.5:1.1
Pali: Yo rūpakkhandhaṁ parijānāti so vedanākkhandhaṁ parijānissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.3.5:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana vedanākkhandhaṁ parijānissati so rūpakkhandhaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya2.3.5:3.1
Pali: Yo rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānāti so vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānissatīti? 
English: 

ya2.3.5:4.1
Pali: Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānanti, no ca vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānissanti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te rūpakkhandhañca na parijānanti vedanākkhandhañca na parijānissanti. 
English: 

ya2.3.5:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānissati so rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya2.3.5:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī vedanākkhandhaṁ na parijānissati, no ca rūpakkhandhaṁ na parijānāti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te vedanākkhandhañca na parijānissanti rūpakkhandhañca na parijānanti. 
English:

ya3.1.2:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.1.2:0.2
Pali: 3.1 Paṇṇattivāra 
English: 

ya3.1.2:0.3
Pali: 3.1.2. Paṇṇattivāraniddesa 
English: 

ya3.1.2:1.0.1

English: 

ya3.1.2:1.0.2
Pali: 3.1.2.1.1. Anuloma 
English: 

ya3.1.2:1.1
Pali: Cakkhu cakkhāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:2.1
Pali: Dibbacakkhu paññācakkhu cakkhu, na cakkhāyatanaṁ. Cakkhāyatanaṁ cakkhu ceva cakkhāyatanañca. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:3.1
Pali: Cakkhāyatanaṁ cakkhūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:4.1
Pali: Sotaṁ sotāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:5.1
Pali: Dibbasotaṁ taṇhāsotaṁ sotaṁ, na sotāyatanaṁ. Sotāyatanaṁ sotañceva sotāyatanañca. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:6.1
Pali: Sotāyatanaṁ sotanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:7.1
Pali: Ghānaṁ ghānāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:8.1
Pali: Ghānāyatanaṁ ghānanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:9.1
Pali: Jivhā jivhāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:10.1
Pali: Jivhāyatanaṁ jivhāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:11.1
Pali: Kāyo kāyāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:12.1
Pali: Kāyāyatanaṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso kāyo, na kāyāyatanaṁ. Kāyāyatanaṁ kāyo ceva kāyāyatanañca. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:13.1
Pali: Kāyāyatanaṁ kāyoti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:14.1
Pali: Rūpaṁ rūpāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:15.1
Pali: Rūpāyatanaṁ ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ rūpaṁ, na rūpāyatanaṁ. Rūpāyatanaṁ rūpañceva rūpāyatanañca. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:16.1
Pali: Rūpāyatanaṁ rūpanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:17.1
Pali: Saddo saddāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:18.1
Pali: Saddāyatanaṁ saddoti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:19.1
Pali: Gandho gandhāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:20.1
Pali: Sīlagandho samādhigandho paññāgandho gandho, na gandhāyatanaṁ. Gandhāyatanaṁ gandho ceva gandhāyatanañca. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:21.1
Pali: Gandhāyatanaṁ gandhoti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:22.1
Pali: Raso rasāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:23.1
Pali: Attharaso dhammaraso vimuttiraso raso, na rasāyatanaṁ. Rasāyatanaṁ raso ceva rasāyatanañca.

ya3.1.2:24.1
Pali: Rasāyatanaṁ rasoti? Āmantā.

Pali: Dhammāyatanaṁ dhammoti? Āmantā.

ya3.1.2:32.1
Pali: Na cakkhu na cakkhāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:33.1
Pali: Na cakkhāyatanaṁ na cakkhūti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:34.1
Pali: Dibbacakkhu paññācakkhu na cakkhāyatanaṁ, cakkhu. Cakkhuñca cakkhāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva cakkhu na ca cakkhāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:35.1
Pali: Na sotaṁ na sotāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:36.1
Pali: Na sotāyatanaṁ na sotanti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:37.1
Pali: Dibbasotaṁ taṇhāsotaṁ na sotāyatanaṁ, sotaṁ. Sotañca sotāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva sotaṁ na ca sotāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:38.1
Pali: Na ghānaṁ na ghānāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:39.1
Pali: Na ghānāyatanaṁ na ghānanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:40.1
Pali: Na jivhā na jivhāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:41.1
Pali: Na jivhāyatanaṁ na jivhāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:42.1
Pali: Na kāyo na kāyāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:43.1
Pali: Na kāyāyatanaṁ na kāyoti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:44.1
Pali: Kāyāyatanaṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso na kāyāyatanaṁ, kāyo. Kāyañca kāyāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva kāyo na ca kāyāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:45.1
Pali: Na rūpaṁ na rūpāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:46.1
Pali: Na rūpāyatanaṁ na rūpanti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:47.1
Pali: Rūpāyatanaṁ ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na rūpāyatanaṁ, rūpaṁ. Rūpañca rūpāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva rūpaṁ na ca rūpāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:48.1
Pali: Na saddo na saddāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:49.1
Pali: Na saddāyatanaṁ na saddoti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:50.1

ya3.1.2:51.1

English: 

ya3.1.2:52.1
Pali: Sīlagandho samādhigandho paññāgandho na gandhāyatanaṁ, gandho. Gandhañca gandhāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva gandho na ca gandhāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:53.1
Pali: Na raso na rasāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:54.1
Pali: Na rasāyatanaṁ na rasoti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:55.1
Pali: Attharaso dhammaraso vimuttiraso na rasāyatanaṁ, raso. Rasañca rasāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva raso na ca rasāyatanaṁ. 
English:

Pali: Na phoṭṭhabbo na phoṭṭhabbāyatananti? Āmantā.

ya3.1.2:61.1

English: 

ya3.1.2:62.1
Pali: Dhammāyatanaṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso na dhammāyatanaṁ, dhammo. Dhammañca dhammāyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva dhammo na ca dhammāyatanaṁ.

ya3.1.2:96.1
Pali: Cakkhu āyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:97.1
Pali: Āyatanā cakkhāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:98.1
Pali: Cakkhāyatanaṁ āyatanañceva cakkhāyatanañca. Avasesā āyatanā na cakkhāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:99.1
Pali: Sotaṁ āyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:100.1
Pali: Āmantā …pe… ghānaṁ … jivhā … kāyo … rūpaṁ … saddo … gandho … raso … phoṭṭhabbo … mano … 
English: 

ya3.1.2:101.1
Pali: Dhammo āyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:102.1
Pali: Āyatanā dhammāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:103.1
Pali: Dhammāyatanaṁ āyatanañceva dhammāyatanañca. Avasesā āyatanā na dhammāyatanaṁ. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:104.0
Pali: 3.1.2.3.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya3.1.2:104.1
Pali: Na cakkhu nāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:105.1
Pali: Cakkhuṁ ṭhapetvā avasesā āyatanā na cakkhu, āyatanā. Cakkhuñca āyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva cakkhu na ca āyatanā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:106.1
Pali: Nāyatanā na cakkhāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:107.1
Pali: Na sotaṁ nāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:108.1
Pali: Sotaṁ ṭhapetvā …pe… ghānaṁ ṭhapetvā …pe… jivhaṁ ṭhapetvā …pe… na ca āyatanā. 
English:

English: 

ya3.1.2:114.1
Pali: Nāyatanā na phoṭṭhabbāyatananti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:115.1
Pali: Na mano nāyatananti? 
English: 

ya3.1.2:116.1
Pali: Manaṁ ṭhapetvā avasesā āyatanā na mano, āyatanā. Manañca āyatanañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva mano na ca āyatanā. 
English: 

ya3.1.2:117.1
Pali: Nāyatanā na manāyatananti? Āmantā.

ya3.2.1:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.2.1:0.2
Pali: 3.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya3.2.1:0.3
Pali: 3.2.1. Uppādavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 3.2.1.1. Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 3.2.1.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.1:1.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:2.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ asotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ sasotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati sotāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:4.1
Pali: Sasotakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sasotakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:5.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:6.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ aghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:7.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:8.1
Pali: Saghānakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Saghānakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:9.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:10.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:11.1
Pali: Sarūpakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:12.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:13.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:14.1
Pali: Sacittakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:15.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:16.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:17.1
Pali: Acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English:

English: 

ya3.2.1:20.1

Pali: Yassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā.

ya3.2.1:22.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti?

ya3.2.1:23.1

ya3.2.1:26.1
Pali: Aghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. (Ghānāyatanamūlakaṁ.)

ya3.2.1:27.1
Pali: Yassa rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:28.1
Pali: Acittakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ manāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sarūpakānaṁ sacittakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanañca uppajjati manāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:29.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:30.1
Pali: Arūpakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacittakānaṁ sarūpakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanañca uppajjati rūpāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:31.1
Pali: Yassa rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:32.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti?

ya3.2.1:33.1
Pali: Arūpakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sarūpakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjati rūpāyatanañca uppajjati. (Rūpāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:34.1
Pali: Yassa manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā.

ya3.2.1:35.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti?

ya3.2.1:36.1
Pali: Acittakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ manāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacittakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjati manāyatanañca uppajjati. (Manāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:37.0
Pali: 3.2.1.1.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.1:37.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:38.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:39.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:40.1
Pali: Rūpāvacare tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Kāmāvacare tattha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:41.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:42.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:43.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:44.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha rūpāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:45.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:46.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:47.1
Pali: Arūpe tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha manāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:48.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:49.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:50.1
Pali: Asaññasatte arūpe tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:51.1
Pali: Yattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:52.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:53.1
Pali: Rūpāvacare tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Kāmāvacare tattha rūpāyatanañca uppajjati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:54.1
Pali: (Yattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha manāyatanaṁ dhammāyatanañca ekasadisaṁ, nānaṁ natthi, upari pana vārasaṅkhepo hotīti jānitabbaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:55.1
Pali: Yattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:56.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:57.1
Pali: Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Kāmāvacare tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. (Ghānāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:58.1
Pali: Yattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:59.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha rūpāyatanañca uppajjati manāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:60.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:61.1
Pali: Arūpe tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre tattha manāyatanañca uppajjati rūpāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:62.1
Pali: Yattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:63.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:64.1
Pali: Arūpe tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre asaññasatte tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjati rūpāyatanañca uppajjati. (Rūpāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:65.1
Pali: Yattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:66.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:67.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Catuvokāre pañcavokāre tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjati manāyatanañca uppajjati. (Manāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:68.0
Pali: 3.2.1.1.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.1:68.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:69.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ asotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ sasotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati sotāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:70.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:71.1

Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:256.1
Pali: Arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca uppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:257.1

Pali: 3.2.1.4.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.1:331.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:332.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:333.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca uppajjittha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:334.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ …pe… rūpāyatanaṁ … manāyatanaṁ … dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:335.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:336.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjittha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:337.1
Pali: Yassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ …pe… manāyatanaṁ … dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:338.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:339.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ aghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca uppajjittha ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. (Ghānāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:340.1

ya3.2.1:347.0
Pali: 3.2.1.4.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.1:347.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:348.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjittha. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati sotāyatanañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:349.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:350.1
Pali: Pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanañca uppajjittha cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:351.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:352.1

English: 

ya3.2.1:353.1

English:

Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca nuppajjittha rūpāyatanañca nuppajjati. 
English:

English:

Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:437.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjati sotāyatanañca uppajjissati.

ya3.2.1:506.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanañca uppajjati manāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:507.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:508.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ aghānakānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjati. Saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca uppajjissati ghānāyatanañca uppajjati. 
English:

ya3.2.1:525.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:526.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati sotāyatanañca nuppajjissati. 
English:

Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa tattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:579.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati dhammāyatanañca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:580.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:581.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:582.1
Pali: Yassa yattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:583.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ aghānakānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati. Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanañca nuppajjati rūpāyatanañca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:584.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjatīti?

Pali: 3.2.1.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.1:606.0.2
Pali: 3.2.1.6.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.1:606.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa sotāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:607.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjittha sotāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:608.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English:

Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa ghānāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English:

Pali: Arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ uppajjittha. Pañcavokārānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjissati rūpāyatanañca uppajjittha. (Rūpāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:665.1
Pali: Yassa yattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:666.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca uppajjittha dhammāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:667.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:668.1
Pali: Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ uppajjittha. Catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca uppajjissati manāyatanañca uppajjittha. (Manāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.1:669.0
Pali: 3.2.1.6.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.1:669.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:670.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:671.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa ghānāyatanaṁ …pe… rūpāyatanaṁ … manāyatanaṁ … dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:672.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:673.1
Pali: Yassa ghānāyatanaṁ …pe… rūpāyatanaṁ … manāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:674.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa manāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha.

Pali: 3.2.1.6.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.1:676.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:677.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:678.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:679.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:680.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:681.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:682.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:683.1
Pali: Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati. Suddhāvāsānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha rūpāyatanañca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:684.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:685.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:686.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa tattha manāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:687.1
Pali: Arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati. Suddhāvāsānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha manāyatanañca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.1:688.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:689.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha.

Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha tassa tattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:691.1

English: 

ya3.2.1:692.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.1:693.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca nuppajjissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjittha. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.)

ya3.2.1:694.1

English:

English: 

ya3.2.1:696.1

English:

Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nuppajjittha. Rūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanañca nuppajjissati ghānāyatanañca nuppajjittha.

ya3.2.2:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.2.2:0.2
Pali: 3.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya3.2.2:0.3
Pali: 3.2.2. Nirodhavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.2:1.0.1
Pali: 3.2.2.1. Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.2:1.0.2
Pali: 3.2.2.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.2:1.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:2.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ asotakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ sasotakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati sotāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:4.1
Pali: Sasotakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sasotakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:5.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:6.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ aghānakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ saghānakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati ghānāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:7.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:8.1
Pali: Saghānakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Saghānakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:9.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:10.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:11.1
Pali: Sarūpakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanañca nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:12.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa manāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:13.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:14.1
Pali: Sacittakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ manāyatanañca nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:15.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa dhammāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:16.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:17.1
Pali: Acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammāyatanañca nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. (Cakkhāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.2:18.1
Pali: Yassa ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English:

English: 

ya3.2.2:20.1
Pali: Sarūpakānaṁ aghānakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Saghānakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanañca nirujjhati ghānāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:21.1

ya3.2.2:26.1

ya3.2.2:27.1
Pali: Yassa rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa manāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:28.1

English: 

ya3.2.2:29.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English:

ya3.2.2:139.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhissati.

English: 

ya3.2.2:192.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:193.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca nirujjhittha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:194.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ …pe… rūpāyatanaṁ …pe… manāyatanaṁ …pe… dhammāyatanaṁ nirujjhitthāti? Āmantā.

ya3.2.2:206.0
Pali: 3.2.2.4.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.2:206.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati …pe…. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:207.0
Pali: 3.2.2.4.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya3.2.2:207.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:208.1
Pali: Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati sotāyatanañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:209.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:210.1
Pali: Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanañca nirujjhittha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:211.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:212.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha. Sacakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati ghānāyatanañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:213.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:214.1
Pali: Kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānāyatanañca nirujjhittha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:215.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:216.1
Pali: Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati rūpāyatanañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:217.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:218.1
Pali: Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanañca nirujjhittha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:219.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha manāyatanaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:220.1
Pali: Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ nirujjhittha. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati manāyatanañca nirujjhittha. 
English:

ya3.2.2:294.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:295.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:296.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:297.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:298.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:299.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati ghānāyatanañca nirujjhissati.

Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:325.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati.

English:

Pali: Pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nirujjhati. Sacakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca nirujjhati.

ya3.2.2:359.0
Pali: 3.2.2.5.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.2:359.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati tassa sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:360.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhati sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:361.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:362.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati. Arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:363.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:364.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhati ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:365.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:366.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati. Pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhati.

ya3.2.2:378.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati. Rūpāvacare parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ rūpāyatanañca na nirujjhissati ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhati. 
English:

English:

Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:502.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca na nirujjhittha sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

English: 

ya3.2.2:539.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha rūpāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ arūpe parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca na nirujjhissati rūpāyatanañca na nirujjhittha. (Rūpāyatanamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya3.2.2:540.1
Pali: Yassa yattha manāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha tassa tattha dhammāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:541.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manāyatanañca na nirujjhittha dhammāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:542.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha dhammāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha manāyatanaṁ na nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.2.2:543.1
Pali: Parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha manāyatanaṁ na nirujjhittha. Suddhāvāse parinibbantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dhammāyatanañca na nirujjhissati manāyatanañca na nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya3.2.2:544.1
Pali: Nirodhavāro. 
English:

ya3.2.3:12.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:13.1
Pali: Sasotakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati. Acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ asotakānaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati sotāyatanañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:14.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:15.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati. Asotakānaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca na nirujjhati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:16.1

English: 

ya3.2.3:17.1

English: 

ya3.2.3:18.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjatīti?

ya3.2.3:62.0.1
Pali: 3.2.3.3. Anāgatavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.3:62.0.2
Pali: 3.2.3.3.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.3:62.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:63.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:64.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:65.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:66.1
Pali: Ye rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjissati ghānāyatanañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:67.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:68.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:69.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:70.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana rūpāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English:

ya3.2.3:120.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati tassa sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:121.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjissati sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjissati ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati.

ya3.2.3:246.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:247.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:248.1

English: 

ya3.2.3:250.1

Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati.

English: 

ya3.2.3:252.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati. 
English:

Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa rūpāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English:

English: 

ya3.2.3:272.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati tassa tattha sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:273.1
Pali: Pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati sotāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:274.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotāyatanaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ nuppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English:

English: 

ya3.2.3:276.1

Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacarā cavantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhāyatanañca nuppajjati ghānāyatanañca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

ya3.2.3:307.0.1
Pali: 3.2.3.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya3.2.3:307.0.2
Pali: 3.2.3.6.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya3.2.3:307.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjittha tassa sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.2.3:308.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre parinibbantānaṁ arūpe pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhāyatanañca uppajjittha sotāyatanañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:309.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotāyatanaṁ nirujjhissati tassa cakkhāyatanaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:310.1
Pali: (Yathā nirodhavāre atītānāgatā pucchā yassakampi yatthakampi yassayatthakampi anulomampi paccanīkampi vibhattaṁ, evaṁ uppādanirodhepi atītānāgatā pucchā vibhajitabbā.) 
English: 

ya3.2.3:311.1
Pali: Uppādanirodhavāro. 
English: 

ya3.2.3:312.1
Pali: Pavattivāro niṭṭhito. 
English:

ya3.3.4
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya3/ya3.3.4_root-pli-ms.json

ya3.3.4:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.3.4:0.2
Pali: 3.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya3.3.4:0.3
Pali: 3.3.4. Paccuppannātītavāra 
English: 

ya3.3.4:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānāti so sotāyatanaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.4:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ parijānittha so cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.4:3.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānāti so sotāyatanaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.3.4:4.1
Pali: Arahā cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānāti, no ca sotāyatanaṁ na parijānittha. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā cakkhāyatanañca na parijānanti sotāyatanañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya3.3.4:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ na parijānittha so cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya3.3.4:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī sotāyatanaṁ na parijānittha, no ca cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānāti. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā sotāyatanañca na parijānittha cakkhāyatanañca na parijānanti. 
English:

ya3.3.5
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya3/ya3.3.5_root-pli-ms.json

ya3.3.5:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.3.5:0.2
Pali: 3.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya3.3.5:0.3
Pali: 3.3.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya3.3.5:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānāti so sotāyatanaṁ parijānissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.5:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ parijānissati so cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.5:3.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānāti so sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.3.5:4.1
Pali: Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānanti, no ca sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissanti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te cakkhāyatanañca na parijānanti sotāyatanañca na parijānissanti. 
English: 

ya3.3.5:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissati so cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya3.3.5:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissati, no ca cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānāti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te sotāyatanañca na parijānissanti cakkhāyatanañca na parijānanti. 
English:

ya3.3.6
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya3/ya3.3.6_root-pli-ms.json

ya3.3.6:0.1
Pali: 3 Āyatanayamaka 
English: 

ya3.3.6:0.2
Pali: 3.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya3.3.6:0.3
Pali: 3.3.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya3.3.6:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānittha so sotāyatanaṁ parijānissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.6:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ parijānissati so cakkhāyatanaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya3.3.6:3.1
Pali: Yo cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānittha so sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissatīti? 
English: 

ya3.3.6:4.1
Pali: Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānittha, no ca sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissanti. Aggamaggasamaṅgī ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te cakkhāyatanañca na parijānittha sotāyatanañca na parijānissanti. 
English: 

ya3.3.6:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissati so cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya3.3.6:6.1
Pali: Arahā sotāyatanaṁ na parijānissati, no ca cakkhāyatanaṁ na parijānittha. Aggamaggasamaṅgī ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te sotāyatanañca na parijānissanti cakkhāyatanañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya3.3.6:7.1
Pali: Pariññāvāro. 
English: 

ya3.3.6:8.1
Pali: Āyatanayamakapāḷi niṭṭhitā. 
English:

Pali: 4 Dhātuyamaka 
English: 

ya4.1.2:0.2

Pali: 4.1.2. Paṇṇattivāraniddesa

ya4.1.2:1.0.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:1.0.2
Pali: 4.1.2.11. Anuloma 
English: 

ya4.1.2:1.1
Pali: Cakkhu cakkhudhātūti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:2.1
Pali: Dibbacakkhu paññācakkhu cakkhu, na cakkhudhātu. Cakkhudhātu cakkhu ceva cakkhudhātu ca. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:3.1
Pali: Cakkhudhātu cakkhūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:4.1
Pali: Sotaṁ sotadhātūti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:5.1
Pali: Dibbasotaṁ taṇhāsotaṁ sotaṁ, na sotadhātu. Sotadhātu sotañceva sotadhātu ca. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:6.1
Pali: Sotadhātu sotanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:7.1
Pali: Ghānaṁ ghānadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:8.1
Pali: Ghānadhātu ghānanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:9.1
Pali: (Jivhāpi ghānadhātusadisā.) 
English: 

ya4.1.2:10.1
Pali: Kāyo kāyadhātūti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:11.1
Pali: Kāyadhātuṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso kāyo, na kāyadhātu. Kāyadhātu kāyo ceva kāyadhātu ca. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:12.1
Pali: Kāyadhātu kāyoti? Āmantā. 
English:

Pali: Rūpaṁ rūpadhātūti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:14.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:15.1
Pali: Rūpadhātu rūpanti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:16.1
Pali: (Saddo ghānasadiso.) 
English: 

ya4.1.2:17.1
Pali: Gandho gandhadhātūti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:18.1

ya4.1.2:19.1

ya4.1.2:35.1

ya4.1.2:36.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:37.1
Pali: Dibbacakkhu paññācakkhu na cakkhudhātu, cakkhu. Cakkhuñca cakkhudhātuñca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva cakkhu na ca cakkhudhātu. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:38.1
Pali: Na sotaṁ na sotadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:39.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:40.1
Pali: Dibbasotaṁ taṇhāsotaṁ na sotadhātu, sotaṁ. Sotañca sotadhātuñca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ na ceva sotaṁ na ca sotadhātu.

ya4.1.2:41.1
Pali: Na ghānaṁ na ghānadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English:

ya4.1.2:43.1

ya4.1.2:46.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:47.1
Pali: Kāyadhātuṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso na kāyadhātu, kāyo. Kāyañca kāyadhātuñca ṭhapetvā avaseso na ceva kāyo na ca kāyadhātu. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:48.1

ya4.1.2:49.1

English: 

ya4.1.2:51.1
Pali: Na saddo …pe… na gandho na gandhadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:52.1

ya4.1.2:53.1
Pali: Sīlagandho samādhigandho paññāgandho na gandhadhātu, gandho. Gandhañca gandhadhātuñca ṭhapetvā avaseso na ceva gandho na ca gandhadhātu. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:54.1
Pali: Na raso na rasadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:55.1
Pali: Na rasadhātu na rasoti? 
English: 

ya4.1.2:56.1
Pali: Attharaso dhammaraso vimuttiraso na rasadhātu, raso. Rasañca rasadhātuñca ṭhapetvā avaseso na ceva raso na ca rasadhātu. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:57.1
Pali: Na phoṭṭhabbo …pe… na cakkhuviññāṇaṁ na cakkhuviññāṇadhātūti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.1.2:58.1
Pali: Na cakkhuviññāṇadhātu na cakkhuviññāṇanti? Āmantā. 
English:

English:

English: 

ya4.1.2:61.1

ya4.2.1:0.2

English: 

ya4.2.1:0.3
Pali: 4.2.1. Uppādavāra 
English: 

ya4.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 4.2.1.1 Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya4.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 4.2.1.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya4.2.1:1.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhudhātu uppajjati tassa sotadhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:2.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ asotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ sotadhātu uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ sasotakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati sotadhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotadhātu uppajjati tassa cakkhudhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:4.1
Pali: Sasotakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotadhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati. Sasotakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ sotadhātu ca uppajjati cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:5.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhudhātu uppajjati tassa ghānadhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:6.1
Pali: Sacakkhukānaṁ aghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ ghānadhātu uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ saghānakānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati ghānadhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:7.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānadhātu uppajjati tassa cakkhudhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:8.1
Pali: Saghānakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānadhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati. Saghānakānaṁ sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ ghānadhātu ca uppajjati cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:9.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhudhātu uppajjati tassa rūpadhātu uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:10.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana rūpadhātu uppajjati tassa cakkhudhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:11.1
Pali: Sarūpakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpadhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ rūpadhātu ca uppajjati cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:12.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhudhātu uppajjati tassa manoviññāṇadhātu uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:13.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana manoviññāṇadhātu uppajjati tassa cakkhudhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:14.1
Pali: Sacittakānaṁ acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manoviññāṇadhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ manoviññāṇadhātu ca uppajjati cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:15.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhudhātu uppajjati tassa dhammadhātu uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:16.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana dhammadhātu uppajjati tassa cakkhudhātu uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya4.2.1:17.1
Pali: Acakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammadhātu uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cakkhudhātu uppajjati. Sacakkhukānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ dhammadhātu ca uppajjati cakkhudhātu ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya4.2.1:18.1
Pali: (Yathā āyatanayamakaṁ vibhattaṁ evaṁ dhātuyamakampi vibhajitabbaṁ, sadisaṁ kātabbaṁ.) 
English:

ya5.1.2:2.1
Pali: Dukkhasaccaṁ dukkhanti? 
English: 

ya5.1.2:3.1
Pali: Kāyikaṁ dukkhaṁ cetasikaṁ dukkhaṁ ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ, na dukkhaṁ. Kāyikaṁ dukkhaṁ cetasikaṁ dukkhaṁ dukkhañceva dukkhasaccañca. 
English: 

ya5.1.2:4.1
Pali: Samudayo samudayasaccanti? 
English: 

ya5.1.2:5.1
Pali: Samudayasaccaṁ ṭhapetvā avaseso samudayo, na samudayasaccaṁ. Samudayasaccaṁ samudayo ceva samudayasaccañca.

ya5.1.2:6.1

ya5.2.1

ya5.2.1:0.1
Pali: 5 Saccayamaka 
English: 

ya5.2.1:0.2
Pali: 5.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:0.3
Pali: 5.2.1. Uppādavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 5.2.1.1. Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 5.2.1.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:1.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:2.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:4.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:5.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte maggavippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre maggassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:6.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:7.1
Pali: Arūpe maggassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Pañcavokāre maggassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:8.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:9.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? No.

ya5.2.1:10.1
Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:11.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Catuvokāre pañcavokāre tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:12.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana …pe… ? Āmantā.

Pali: 5.2.1.1.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:21.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:22.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:23.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nuppajjati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:24.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:25.1
Pali: Arūpe maggassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe phalassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:26.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:27.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte maggavippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe phalassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nuppajjati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:28.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:29.1
Pali: Maggassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttamaggavippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:30.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:31.1
Pali: Taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe maggavippayuttataṇhāvippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccañca nuppajjati samudayasaccañca nuppajjati.

Pali: 5.2.1.3. Anāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:85.0.2
Pali: 5.2.1.3.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:85.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:86.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:87.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana …pe… ? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:88.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:89.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjissati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:90.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana …pe… uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:91.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:92.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjissati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:93.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:94.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English:

English: 

ya5.2.1:99.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:100.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti, ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjissati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:101.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:102.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:103.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjissati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:104.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:105.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English:

Pali: 5.2.1.4. Paccuppannātītavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:127.0.2
Pali: 5.2.1.4.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:127.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:128.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:129.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjittha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:130.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? Anabhisametāvīnaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Abhisametāvīnaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:131.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:132.1
Pali: Abhisametāvīnaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Abhisametāvīnaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjittha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:133.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:134.1
Pali: Anabhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:135.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:136.1
Pali: Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjittha samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:137.0
