ya5.2.1:138.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:139.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ upapatticittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Itaresaṁ catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:140.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:141.1
Pali: Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjittha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:142.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti?

Abhisametāvīnaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjittha.

English: 

ya5.2.1:174.0.1
Pali: 5.2.1.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:174.0.2
Pali: 5.2.1.5.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:174.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:175.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:176.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:177.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:178.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:179.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:180.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:181.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:182.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:183.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:184.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:185.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:186.0
Pali: 5.2.1.5.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.1:186.1
Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati …pe… 
English: 

ya5.2.1:187.1
Pali: (Yatthakampi yassayatthakasadisaṁ kātabbaṁ.) 
English: 

ya5.2.1:188.0
Pali: 5.2.1.5.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.1:188.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:189.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:190.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:191.1
Pali: Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:192.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:193.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:194.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:195.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:196.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:197.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:198.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:199.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:200.0
Pali: 5.2.1.5.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:200.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:201.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati samudayasaccañca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:202.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:203.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nuppajjissati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:204.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:205.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nuppajjissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjissati.

ya5.2.1:207.1

English: 

ya5.2.1:209.1

Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjissati.

ya5.2.1:211.1

Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjissati.

Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ, āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca nuppajjissati.

ya5.2.1:224.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nuppajjissati samudayasaccañca nuppajjati.

ya5.2.1:225.0.1
Pali: 5.2.1.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.1:225.0.2
Pali: 5.2.1.6.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.1:225.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:226.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:227.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:228.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:229.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:230.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana …pe… ? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:231.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti, ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjittha maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:232.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana …pe… ? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:233.0
Pali: 5.2.1.6.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.1:233.1
Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:234.0
Pali: 5.2.1.6.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.1:234.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:235.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha samudayasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:236.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:237.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:238.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:239.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:240.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:241.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca uppajjissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:242.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:243.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjittha maggasaccañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.1:244.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.1:245.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjittha. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca uppajjissati samudayasaccañca uppajjittha. 
English:

ya5.2.2:0.1
Pali: 5 Saccayamaka 
English: 

ya5.2.2:0.2
Pali: 5.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya5.2.2:0.3
Pali: 5.2.2. Nirodhavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.2:1.0.1
Pali: 5.2.2.1 Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.2:1.0.2
Pali: 5.2.2.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.2:1.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:2.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati samudayasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:4.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:5.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte maggavippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Pañcavokāre maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:6.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:7.1
Pali: Arūpe maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Pañcavokāre maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:8.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:9.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:10.0
Pali: 5.2.2.1.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English:

English: 

ya5.2.2:11.1
Pali: Asaññasatte tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:12.1
Pali: (Yatthakaṁ uppādepi nirodhepi uppādanirodhepi sadisaṁ, natthi nānākaraṇaṁ.) 
English: 

ya5.2.2:13.0
Pali: 5.2.2.1.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa

English: 

ya5.2.2:14.1
Pali: (Yassayatthakampi sadisaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.) 
English: 

ya5.2.2:15.0
Pali: 5.2.2.1.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.2:15.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:16.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:17.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:18.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:19.1
Pali: Arūpe maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe phalassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati maggasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:20.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:21.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte maggavippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe phalassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca na nirujjhati dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:22.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:23.1
Pali: Maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttamaggavippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati maggasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:24.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:25.1
Pali: Taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe maggavippayuttataṇhāvippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccañca na nirujjhati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:26.0

English: 

ya5.2.2:54.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

Pali: 5.2.2.3.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.2:56.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:57.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:58.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:59.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:60.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti?

Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:62.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:63.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:64.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:65.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati.

Pali: 5.2.2.4.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.2:66.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:67.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhittha tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:68.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nirujjhittha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:69.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:70.1
Pali: Anabhisametāvīnaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhittha. Abhisametāvīnaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:71.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhittha tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:72.1
Pali: Abhisametāvīnaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Abhisametāvīnaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhittha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati.

ya5.2.2:73.1

ya5.2.2:74.1
Pali: Anabhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhittha. Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:75.1

English: 

ya5.2.2:76.1
Pali: Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Abhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhittha samudayasaccañca nirujjhati.

Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne anabhisametāvīnaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati maggasaccañca na nirujjhittha.

Pali: 5.2.2.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.2:113.0.2
Pali: 5.2.2.5.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.2:113.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:114.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:115.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:116.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:117.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:118.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:119.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:120.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:121.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:122.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:123.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:124.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:125.0
Pali: 5.2.2.5.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.2:125.1
Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:126.0
Pali: 5.2.2.5.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.2:126.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:127.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:128.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:129.1
Pali: Catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati. Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:130.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:131.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:132.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:133.1

Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:134.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:135.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nirujjhati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati.

ya5.2.2:137.1

Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca nirujjhati.

English:

Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati.

Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati.

Arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca na nirujjhati maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati.

Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:173.0
Pali: 5.2.2.6.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.2:173.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:174.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgīnaṁ arahantānaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhittha samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:175.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:176.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:177.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:178.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nirujjhittha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:179.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:180.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ nirujjhittha. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:181.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhittha tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.2:182.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti āpāyikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nirujjhittha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:183.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhitthāti. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:184.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhittha. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca nirujjhittha. 
English: 

ya5.2.2:185.0

ya5.2.2:196.1

English: 

ya5.2.2:197.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca na nirujjhittha maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati.

ya5.2.3:12.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:13.1
Pali: Taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:14.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:15.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte taṇhāvippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca na nirujjhati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:16.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:17.1
Pali: Maggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte maggavippayuttacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca na nirujjhati.

ya5.2.3:18.1

English: 

ya5.2.3:59.0.1
Pali: 5.2.3.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.2.3:59.0.2
Pali: 5.2.3.5.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.3:59.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:60.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:61.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:62.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Sabbesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:63.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:64.1
Pali: Arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:65.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:66.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:67.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:68.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:69.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:70.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:71.0
Pali: 5.2.3.5.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.3:71.1
Pali: Yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:72.0
Pali: 5.2.3.5.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya5.2.3:72.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:73.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ …pe… itaresaṁ catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ …pe…. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:74.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:75.1
Pali: Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Catuvokāraṁ pañcavokāraṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:76.1
Pali: Yassa yattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:77.1
Pali: Arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:78.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:79.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccaṁ uppajjati. Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:80.1
Pali: Yassa yattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati tassa tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:81.1
Pali: Āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccañca uppajjati maggasaccañca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:82.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati tassa tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:83.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha maggasaccaṁ nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha samudayasaccaṁ uppajjati. Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:84.0
Pali: 5.2.3.5.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya5.2.3:84.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:85.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:86.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:87.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggamaggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ samudayasaccañca na nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:88.1
Pali: Yassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:89.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe maggassa ca phalassa ca uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggaphalassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:90.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:91.1
Pali: Arahantānaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ pavatte cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ dukkhasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggaphalassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:92.1
Pali: Yassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati tassa maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:93.1
Pali: Aggamaggassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā aggamaggaṁ paṭilabhissanti ye caññe maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne tesaṁ samudayasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya5.2.3:94.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati tassa samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya5.2.3:95.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ maggasaccaṁ na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ samudayasaccaṁ nuppajjati. Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne tesaṁ maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca nuppajjati.

Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arūpe aggaphalassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha dukkhasaccañca nuppajjati maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati.

Aggamaggassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe arahantānaṁ āpāyikānaṁ ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti tesaṁ taṇhāya bhaṅgakkhaṇe taṇhāvippayuttacitte vattamāne asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha maggasaccañca na nirujjhissati samudayasaccañca nuppajjati.

ya5.3.4
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya5/ya5.3.4_root-pli-ms.json

ya5.3.4:0.1
Pali: 5 Saccayamaka 
English: 

ya5.3.4:0.2
Pali: 5.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya5.3.4:0.3
Pali: 5.3.4. Paccuppannātītavāra 
English: 

ya5.3.4:1.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ parijānāti so samudayasaccaṁ pajahitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.4:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ pajahittha so dukkhasaccaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.4:3.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānāti so samudayasaccaṁ nappajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.3.4:4.1
Pali: Arahā dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānāti, no ca samudayasaccaṁ nappajahittha. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā dukkhasaccañca na parijānanti samudayasaccañca nappajahittha. 
English: 

ya5.3.4:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nappajahittha so dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya5.3.4:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī samudayasaccaṁ nappajahittha, no ca dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānāti. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā samudayasaccañca nappajahittha dukkhasaccañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

================================================================================
ya5.3.5
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya5/ya5.3.5_root-pli-ms.json

ya5.3.5:0.1
Pali: 5 Saccayamaka 
English: 

ya5.3.5:0.2
Pali: 5.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya5.3.5:0.3
Pali: 5.3.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.3.5:1.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ parijānāti so samudayasaccaṁ pajahissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.5:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ pajahissati so dukkhasaccaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.5:3.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānāti so samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.3.5:4.1
Pali: Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānanti, no ca samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissanti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te dukkhasaccañca na parijānanti samudayasaccañca nappajahissanti. 
English: 

ya5.3.5:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissati so dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya5.3.5:6.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissati, no ca dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānāti. Arahā ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te samudayasaccañca nappajahissanti dukkhasaccañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

================================================================================
ya5.3.6
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya5/ya5.3.6_root-pli-ms.json

ya5.3.6:0.1
Pali: 5 Saccayamaka 
English: 

ya5.3.6:0.2
Pali: 5.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya5.3.6:0.3
Pali: 5.3.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya5.3.6:1.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ parijānittha so samudayasaccaṁ pajahissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.6:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ pajahissati so dukkhasaccaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya5.3.6:3.1
Pali: Yo dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānittha so samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya5.3.6:4.1
Pali: Ye maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānittha, no ca te samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissanti. Aggamaggasamaṅgī ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te dukkhasaccañca na parijānittha samudayasaccañca nappajahissanti. 
English: 

ya5.3.6:5.1
Pali: Yo vā pana samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissati so dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya5.3.6:6.1
Pali: Arahā samudayasaccaṁ nappajahissati, no ca dukkhasaccaṁ na parijānittha. Aggamaggasamaṅgī ye ca puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te samudayasaccañca nappajahissanti dukkhasaccañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya5.3.6:7.1
Pali: Pariññāvāro. 
English: 

ya5.3.6:8.1
Pali: Saccayamakapāḷi niṭṭhitā. 
English:

ya6.1.1:2.1

English: 

ya6.1.2:3.1
Pali: Vacī vacīsaṅkhāroti? No. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:4.1
Pali: Vacīsaṅkhāro vacīti? No. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:5.1
Pali: Cittaṁ cittasaṅkhāroti? No. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:6.1
Pali: Cittasaṅkhāro cittanti? No. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:7.0
Pali: 6.1.2.1.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya6.1.2:7.1
Pali: Na kāyo na kāyasaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:8.1
Pali: Kāyasaṅkhāro na kāyo, kāyasaṅkhāro. Kāyañca kāyasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva kāyo na ca kāyasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:9.1
Pali: Na kāyasaṅkhāro na kāyoti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:10.1
Pali: Kāyo na kāyasaṅkhāro, kāyo. Kāyañca kāyasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva kāyo na ca kāyasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:11.1
Pali: Na vacī na vacīsaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:12.1
Pali: Vacīsaṅkhāro na vacī, vacīsaṅkhāro. Vaciñca vacīsaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva vacī na ca vacīsaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:13.1
Pali: Na vacīsaṅkhāro na vacīti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:14.1
Pali: Vacī na vacīsaṅkhāro, vacī. Vaciñca vacīsaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva vacī na ca vacīsaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:15.1
Pali: Na cittaṁ na cittasaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:16.1
Pali: Cittasaṅkhāro na cittaṁ, cittasaṅkhāro. Cittañca cittasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva cittaṁ na ca cittasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:17.1
Pali: Na cittasaṅkhāro na cittanti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:18.1

Pali: Na kāyasaṅkhāro na cittasaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:66.1
Pali: Cittasaṅkhāro na kāyasaṅkhāro, cittasaṅkhāro. Kāyasaṅkhārañca cittasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva kāyasaṅkhāro na ca cittasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:67.1
Pali: Na cittasaṅkhāro na kāyasaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:68.1
Pali: Kāyasaṅkhāro na cittasaṅkhāro, kāyasaṅkhāro. Cittasaṅkhārañca kāyasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva cittasaṅkhāro na ca kāyasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:69.1
Pali: Na vacīsaṅkhāro na cittasaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:70.1
Pali: Cittasaṅkhāro na vacīsaṅkhāro, cittasaṅkhāro. Vacīsaṅkhārañca cittasaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva vacīsaṅkhāro na ca cittasaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:71.1
Pali: Na cittasaṅkhāro na vacīsaṅkhāroti? 
English: 

ya6.1.2:72.1
Pali: Vacīsaṅkhāro na cittasaṅkhāro, vacīsaṅkhāro. Cittasaṅkhārañca vacīsaṅkhārañca ṭhapetvā avasesā na ceva cittasaṅkhāro na ca vacīsaṅkhāro. 
English: 

ya6.1.2:73.1
Pali: Paṇṇattiniddesavāro. 
English:

ya6.2.1

ya6.2.1:0.1
Pali: 6 Saṅkhārayamaka 
English: 

ya6.2.1:0.2
Pali: 6.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya6.2.1:0.3
Pali: 6.2.1. Uppādavāra 
English: 

ya6.2.1:1.0.1
Pali: 6.2.1.1 Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya6.2.1:1.0.2
Pali: 6.2.1.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.1:1.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:2.1
Pali: Vinā vitakkavicārehi assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:4.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:5.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:6.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:7.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:8.1
Pali: Yassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:9.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:10.1
Pali: Vinā vitakkavicārehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:11.0
Pali: 6.2.1.1.2. Anulomaokāsa 
English: 

ya6.2.1:11.1
Pali: Yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:12.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhāne tatiyajjhāne tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhāne kāmāvacare tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:13.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:14.1
Pali: Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhāne kāmāvacare tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:15.1
Pali: Yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:16.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:17.1
Pali: Catutthajjhāne rūpāvacare arūpāvacare tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhāne dutiyajjhāne tatiyajjhāne kāmāvacare tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:18.1
Pali: Yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:19.1
Pali: Yattha vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:20.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhāne tatiyajjhāne catutthajjhāne tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhāne kāmāvacare rūpāvacare arūpāvacare tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:21.0
Pali: 6.2.1.1.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa

ya6.2.1:23.0
Pali: 6.2.1.1.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.1:23.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:24.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi avitakkaavicāracittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:25.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:26.1

Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi avitakkaavicāracittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:27.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:28.1

English: 

ya6.2.1:29.1

ya6.2.1:55.0
Pali: 6.2.1.2.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya6.2.1:55.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:56.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:57.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:58.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:59.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:60.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:61.1
Pali: Catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:62.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:63.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:64.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ itaresaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English:

English: 

ya6.2.1:83.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:84.1
Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:85.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:86.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English:

Pali: Yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati.

ya6.2.1:92.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:93.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati.

Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati.

English: 

ya6.2.1:124.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati.

Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁyeva vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha.

ya6.2.1:159.0.1
Pali: 6.2.1.5. Paccuppannānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya6.2.1:159.0.2
Pali: 6.2.1.5.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.1:159.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:160.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:161.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:162.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:163.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:164.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:165.1
Pali: Yassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:166.1
Pali: Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:167.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:168.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā vitakkavicārehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:169.0
Pali: 6.2.1.5.2. Anulomaokāsa

ya6.2.1:170.0
Pali: 6.2.1.5.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya6.2.1:170.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:171.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:172.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:173.1
Pali: Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁyeva vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:174.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:175.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:176.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:177.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:178.1
Pali: Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:179.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:180.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā vitakkavicārehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjati. Vitakkavicārānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:181.0
Pali: 6.2.1.5.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.1:181.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:182.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjissati. Pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:183.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:184.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati tassa cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:185.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa uppādakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjati, no ca tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati. Pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:186.1

Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjati cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati.

English: 

ya6.2.1:212.1
Pali: Yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha …pe…. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:213.0
Pali: 6.2.1.6.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya6.2.1:213.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:214.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:215.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:216.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:217.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:218.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:219.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:220.1
Pali: Catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:221.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:222.1
Pali: Savitakkasavicārabhūmiyaṁ pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ savitakkasavicārabhūmiyaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:223.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:224.1
Pali: Avitakkaavicārabhūmiyaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro uppajjittha. Savitakkasavicārabhūmiyaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca uppajjissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:225.0

ya6.2.1:233.1

Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:234.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:235.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjittha. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:236.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:237.1
Pali: Catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:238.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:239.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro nuppajjittha. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:240.1
Pali: Yassa yattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjittha tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:241.1
Pali: Avitakkaavicārabhūmiyaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati. Avitakkaavicārabhūmiyaṁ pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:242.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya6.2.1:243.1
Pali: Savitakkasavicārabhūmiyaṁ pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro nuppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro nuppajjittha. Avitakkaavicārabhūmiyaṁ pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca nuppajjissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nuppajjittha. 
English: 

ya6.2.1:244.1
Pali: Uppādavāro. 
English:

ya6.2.2:0.1
Pali: 6 Saṅkhārayamaka 
English: 

ya6.2.2:0.2
Pali: 6.2 Pavattivāra 
English: 

ya6.2.2:0.3
Pali: 6.2.2. Nirodhavāra 
English: 

ya6.2.2:1.0.1
Pali: 6.2.2.1. Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya6.2.2:1.0.2
Pali: 6.2.2.1.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.2:1.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:2.1
Pali: Vinā vitakkavicārehi assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:3.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:4.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi vitakkavicārānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:5.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:6.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:7.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhati. Assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:8.1
Pali: Yassa vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:9.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:10.1
Pali: Vinā vitakkavicārehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhati. Vitakkavicārānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nirujjhati. 
English:

ya6.2.2:13.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:14.1
Pali: Vinā assāsapassāsehi vitakkavicārānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhati. Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi avitakkaavicāracittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati.

Pali: 6.2.2.3. Anāgatavāra

ya6.2.2:31.0.2
Pali: 6.2.2.3.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.2:31.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:32.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:33.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:34.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati tassa cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhissatīti? Āmantā.

English: 

ya6.2.2:36.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati.

Paṭhamajjhānaṁ dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati.

ya6.2.2:49.1

English: 

ya6.2.2:50.1
Pali: Avitakkaavicārapacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro nirujjhissati. Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ itaresaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cittasaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:51.0
Pali: 6.2.2.3.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya6.2.2:51.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:52.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

English: 

ya6.2.2:55.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati cittasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

Pali: Kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā kāmāvacarānaṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English:

English: 

ya6.2.2:73.1

ya6.2.2:131.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:132.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati tassa kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:133.1
Pali: Yassa kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati tassa cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:134.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati cittasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:135.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana …pe… ? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:136.1
Pali: Yassa vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhati tassa cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:137.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa uppādakkhaṇe vinā vitakkavicārehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe nirodhasamāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Avitakkaavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati cittasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:138.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati tassa vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:139.1
Pali: Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhati. Avitakkaavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ cittasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati.

Pali: 6.2.2.5.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya6.2.2:141.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati tassa tattha vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:142.1
Pali: Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁyeva vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati, no ca tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati. Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁyeva vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:143.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati tassa tattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhatīti? 
English: 

ya6.2.2:144.1
Pali: Dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro na nirujjhissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati. Savitakkasavicārapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe avitakkaavicārapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā avitakkaavicāraṁ pacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati dutiyajjhānaṁ tatiyajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ assāsapassāsānaṁ uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁyeva vinā assāsapassāsehi cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe catutthajjhānaṁ samāpannānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha vacīsaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhissati kāyasaṅkhāro ca na nirujjhati. 
English: 

ya6.2.2:145.1
Pali: Yassa yattha kāyasaṅkhāro na nirujjhati tassa tattha cittasaṅkhāro na nirujjhissatīti? 
English:
