Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ purisānaṁ uppajjantānaṁ ye ca purisā somanassena upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjati. Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ ye ca purisā somanassena upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2315.1
Pali: Yassa yattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjati tassa tattha saddhindriyaṁ …pe… paññindriyaṁ …pe… manindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2316.1
Pali: Kāmāvacarā cavantānaṁ na purisānaṁ kāmāvacaraṁ upapajjantānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyañca na uppajjati manindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2317.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2318.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ purisānaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjati. Kāmāvacare parinibbantānaṁ rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjati. (Purisindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2319.1
Pali: Yassa yattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjati tassa tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2320.1
Pali: Catuvokārā pañcavokārā cavantānaṁ pavatte cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā upekkhāsampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyañca na uppajjati somanassindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2321.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2322.1
Pali: Pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā upekkhāsampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tassa cittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe yassa cittassa anantarā upekkhāsampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca na uppajjissati jīvitindriyañca na uppajjati.

English: 

ya10.2.1:2330.1
Pali: Pacchimacittassa uppādakkhaṇe asaññasattaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjati. Pacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattā cavantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyañca na uppajjissati jīvitindriyañca na uppajjati. (Jīvitindriyamūlakaṁ.)

ya10.2.1:2331.1
Pali: Yassa yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjati tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2332.1
Pali: Sabbesaṁ cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe somanassavippayuttacittassa uppādakkhaṇe tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjati, no ca tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Somanassasampayuttapacchimacittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe upekkhāsampayuttapacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā somanassasampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tassa cittassa bhaṅgakkhaṇe asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca na uppajjati upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English:

ya10.2.1:2351.0.1
Pali: 10.2.1.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2351.0.2
Pali: 10.2.1.6.1. Anulomapuggala 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2351.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa sotindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2352.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca arūpaṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ sotindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhundriyañca uppajjittha sotindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2353.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotindriyaṁ uppajjissati tassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2354.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa ghānindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2355.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ ghānindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhundriyañca uppajjittha ghānindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2356.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana ghānindriyaṁ uppajjissati tassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2357.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa itthindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2358.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti ye ca purisā eteneva bhāvena katici bhave dassetvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ itthindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhundriyañca uppajjittha itthindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2359.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana itthindriyaṁ uppajjissati tassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English:

Pali: Yassa cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa purisindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2361.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti yā ca itthiyo eteneva bhāvena katici bhave dassetvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ purisindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ cakkhundriyañca uppajjittha purisindriyañca uppajjissati.

ya10.2.1:2388.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca somanassena upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ upekkhindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ ghānindriyañca uppajjittha upekkhindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2389.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana upekkhindriyaṁ uppajjissati tassa ghānindriyaṁ uppajjitthāti? Āmantā. 
English:

Pali: Yassa ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa saddhindriyaṁ …pe… paññindriyaṁ …pe… manindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti?

Pali: Yassa itthindriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa purisindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2394.1
Pali: Pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca rūpāvacaraṁ arūpāvacaraṁ upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti yā ca itthiyo eteneva bhāvena katici bhave dassetvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ itthindriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ purisindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ tesaṁ itthindriyañca uppajjittha purisindriyañca uppajjissati.

Pali: 10.2.1.6.3. Anulomapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2445.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha sotindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2446.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhundriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha sotindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha cakkhundriyañca uppajjittha sotindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English:

ya10.2.1:2481.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha. Kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyañca uppajjissati ghānindriyañca uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2482.1
Pali: Yassa yattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha somanassindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2483.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca saghānakā upekkhāya upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyañca uppajjittha somanassindriyañca uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2484.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha somanassindriyaṁ uppajjissati tassa tattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2485.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha. Kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca uppajjissati ghānindriyañca uppajjittha. 
English:

Pali: Yassa yattha ghānindriyaṁ uppajjittha tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ uppajjissatīti?

English: 

ya10.2.1:2495.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ yā ca itthiyo eteneva bhāvena katici bhave dassetvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ tattha itthindriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha itthindriyañca uppajjittha purisindriyañca uppajjissati.

English: 

ya10.2.1:2530.1
Pali: Pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā upekkhāsampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ uppajjissati. Itaresaṁ catuvokārānaṁ pañcavokārānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyañca uppajjittha somanassindriyañca uppajjissati.

Pali: 10.2.1.6.4. Paccanīkapuggala 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2561.1
Pali: Yassa cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? Natthi. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2562.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha.

ya10.2.1:2573.0
Pali: 10.2.1.6.5. Paccanīkaokāsa 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2573.1
Pali: Yattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha tattha sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? …pe…. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2574.0
Pali: 10.2.1.6.6. Paccanīkapuggalokāsa 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2574.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2575.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2576.1
Pali: Pañcavokāre pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha sotindriyañca na uppajjissati cakkhundriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2577.1
Pali: Yassa yattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha ghānindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2578.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha ghānindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2579.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha ghānindriyañca na uppajjissati cakkhundriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2580.1

Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ rūpāvacarānaṁ ye ca purisā eteneva bhāvena katici bhave dassetvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ tattha itthindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha cakkhundriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Suddhāvāsānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha itthindriyañca na uppajjissati cakkhundriyañca na uppajjittha.

ya10.2.1:2644.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2645.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha jīvitindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2646.1
Pali: Yassa yattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2647.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Rūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyañca na uppajjittha somanassindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2648.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2649.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca purisā upekkhāya upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Rūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ arūpānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2650.1
Pali: Yassa yattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2651.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyañca na uppajjittha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2652.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2653.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ ye ca purisā somanassena upapajjitvā parinibbāyissanti tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2654.1
Pali: Yassa yattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha saddhindriyaṁ …pe… paññindriyaṁ …pe… manindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2655.1
Pali: Rūpāvacarānaṁ arūpāvacarānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha purisindriyañca na uppajjittha manindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2656.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2657.1
Pali: Kāmāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha purisindriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Rūpāvacare arūpāvacare pacchimabhavikānaṁ asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha manindriyañca na uppajjissati purisindriyañca na uppajjittha. (Purisindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2658.1
Pali: Yassa yattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? Uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2659.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2660.1
Pali: Yassa yattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ …pe… saddhindriyaṁ …pe… paññindriyaṁ …pe… manindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? Uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2661.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha jīvitindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? Uppajjittha. (Jīvitindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2662.1
Pali: Yassa yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2663.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca na uppajjittha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2664.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2665.1
Pali: Pacchimacittasamaṅgīnaṁ yassa cittassa anantarā somanassasampayuttapacchimacittaṁ uppajjissati tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjissati, no ca tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjittha. Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjissati somanassindriyañca na uppajjittha. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2666.1
Pali: Yassa yattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjittha tassa tattha saddhindriyaṁ …pe… paññindriyaṁ …pe… manindriyaṁ na uppajjissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2667.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsānaṁ dutiye citte vattamāne tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha somanassindriyañca na uppajjittha manindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English:

ya10.2.1:2669.1

English: 

ya10.2.1:2670.1

English: 

ya10.2.1:2671.1
Pali: Suddhāvāsaṁ upapajjantānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjittha, no ca tesaṁ tattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati. Asaññasattānaṁ tesaṁ tattha upekkhindriyañca na uppajjittha manindriyañca na uppajjissati. 
English: 

ya10.2.1:2672.1
Pali: Yassa vā pana yattha manindriyaṁ na uppajjissati tassa tattha upekkhindriyaṁ na uppajjitthāti?

ya10.2.1:2673.1

Pali: 10 Indriyayamaka 
English: 

ya10.3.1:0.2
Pali: 10.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya10.3.1:0.3
Pali: 10.3.1. Paccuppannavāra 
English: 

ya10.3.1:1.0
Pali: 10.3.1.1. Anuloma 
English: 

ya10.3.1:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānāti so sotindriyaṁ parijānātīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana sotindriyaṁ parijānāti so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānātīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:3.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānāti so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:4.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:5.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānāti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:6.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānātīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:7.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānāti so aññindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:8.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāveti so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:9.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāventi, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ parijānanti. Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññindriyañca bhāveti cakkhundriyañca parijānāti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:10.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānāti so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarotīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:11.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikaroti so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānātīti? No. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:12.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:13.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:14.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:15.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāveti so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:16.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāventi, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahanti. Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī aññindriyañca bhāveti domanassindriyañca pajahati. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:17.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarotīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:18.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikaroti so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? No. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:19.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:20.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāveti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:21.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarotīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:22.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikaroti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:23.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarotīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:24.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikaroti so aññindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? No. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:25.0
Pali: 10.3.1.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya10.3.1:25.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:26.1
Pali: Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti domanassindriyañca nappajahanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:27.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:28.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:29.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:30.1
Pali: Aṭṭhamako cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:31.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:32.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:33.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:34.1
Pali: Dve puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāventi. Tayo maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:35.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:36.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarotīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:37.1
Pali: Yo aggaphalaṁ sacchikaroti so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:38.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:39.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Aggamaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:40.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:41.1
Pali: Aṭṭhamako domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:42.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:43.1
Pali: Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati. Dve maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi domanassindriyañca nappajahanti. 
English:

Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti?

English: 

ya10.3.1:48.1
Pali: Yo aggaphalaṁ sacchikaroti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti. Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:49.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:50.1
Pali: Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati. Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgiñca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti domanassindriyañca nappajahanti. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:51.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:52.1
Pali: Tayo maggasamaṅgino anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāventi, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāventi. Cattāro maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi aññindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:53.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:54.1
Pali: Aṭṭhamako aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti. Cattāro maggasamaṅgino ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāventi anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:55.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarotīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:56.1
Pali: Yo aggaphalaṁ sacchikaroti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti. Aṭṭhamakañca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:57.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:58.1
Pali: Aṭṭhamako aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti. Aṭṭhamakañca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.1:59.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarotīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:60.1
Pali: Yo aggaphalaṁ sacchikaroti so aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti. Tayo maggasamaṅgino ca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāventi aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti. 
English: 

ya10.3.1:61.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaroti so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.1:62.1
Pali: Tayo maggasamaṅgino aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaronti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāventi. Tayo maggasamaṅgino ca arahantañca ṭhapetvā avasesā puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikaronti aññindriyañca na bhāventi. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.)

ya10.3.3
Root: root/pli/ms/abhidhamma/ya/ya10/ya10.3.3_root-pli-ms.json

ya10.3.3:0.1
Pali: 10 Indriyayamaka 
English: 

ya10.3.3:0.2
Pali: 10.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya10.3.3:0.3
Pali: 10.3.3. Anāgatavāra 
English: 

ya10.3.3:1.0
Pali: 10.3.3.1. Anuloma 
English: 

ya10.3.3:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:2.1
Pali: Dve puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahissanti. Pañca puggalā cakkhundriyañca parijānissanti domanassindriyañca pajahissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:3.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ pajahissati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:4.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:5.1
Pali: Cha puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te cakkhundriyañca parijānissanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:6.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:7.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:8.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:9.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:10.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:11.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ parijānissati. Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti cakkhundriyañca parijānissanti. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:12.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:13.1
Pali: Cattāro puggalā domanassindriyaṁ pajahissanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te domanassindriyañca pajahissanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:14.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:15.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahissati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:16.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:17.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahissanti, pañca puggalā aññindriyañca bhavissanti domanassindriyañca pajahissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:18.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahissati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:19.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:20.1
Pali: Tayo puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahissanti. Pañca puggalā aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti domanassindriyañca pajahissanti. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:21.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:22.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:23.1
Pali: Cha puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te aññindriyañca bhāvessanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:24.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:25.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:26.1
Pali: Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvessanti. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:27.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:28.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:29.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati, no ca aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati. Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti aññindriyañca bhāvessanti. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:30.0
Pali: 10.3.3.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya10.3.3:30.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:31.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:32.1
Pali: Dve puggalā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissanti. Tayo puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:33.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:34.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissatīti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:35.1
Pali: Cha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissanti. Tayo puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:36.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:37.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:38.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissati so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:39.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissati, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati. Dve puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānissanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:40.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānissatīti? Āmantā. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:41.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:42.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:43.1
Pali: Cattāro puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti. Pañca puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:44.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:45.1
Pali: Dve puggalā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Tayo puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:46.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:47.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:48.1
Pali: Tayo puggalā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Dve puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:49.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? Āmantā. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:50.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:51.1
Pali: Cha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Tayo puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:52.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:53.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:54.1
Pali: Satta puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Dve puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:55.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.3:56.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.3:57.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati. Dve puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.3:58.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.)

ya10.3.4:24.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.4:25.1
Pali: Dve puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha. Cha puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti domanassindriyañca nappajahittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.4:26.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? Āmantā.

English: 

ya10.3.4:28.1
Pali: Cha puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha. Dve puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvittha.

ya10.3.4:29.1

English: 

ya10.3.4:31.1
Pali: Arahā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha. Satta puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññindriyañca na bhāvittha.

English: 

ya10.3.4:34.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikaritthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.4:35.1
Pali: Arahā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha. Aṭṭha puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.4:36.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.4:37.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Aṭṭha puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarittha cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English:

ya10.3.4:50.1

English: 

ya10.3.4:51.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.4:52.1
Pali: Aṭṭhamako aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāveti. Satta puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāvittha anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāventi. 
English:

English: 

ya10.3.4:55.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti?

ya10.3.4:58.1
Pali: Arahā aññindriyaṁ na bhāveti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha. Cha puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāventi aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.4:59.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.4:60.1
Pali: Tayo maggasamaṅgino aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāventi. Cha puggalā aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarittha aññindriyañca na bhāventi. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.)

English: 

ya10.3.5:9.1
Pali: Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ parijānanti. Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissati cakkhundriyañca parijānāti. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.5:10.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:11.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:12.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:13.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:14.1
Pali: Cha puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahanti anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī aññindriyañca bhāvessati, domanassindriyañca pajahati. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:15.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahati so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:16.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:17.1
Pali: Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahanti. Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissati domanassindriyañca pajahati. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.5:18.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:19.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:20.1
Pali: Cha puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāventi. Aṭṭhamako aññindriyañca bhāvessati anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāveti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:21.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:22.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:23.1
Pali: Satta puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāventi. Aṭṭhamako aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissati anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāveti. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.5:24.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ bhāveti so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? Āmantā. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:25.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvetīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:26.1
Pali: Pañca puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca aññindriyaṁ bhāventi. Tayo maggasamaṅgino aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti aññindriyañca bhāventi. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.5:27.0
Pali: 10.3.5.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya10.3.5:27.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:28.1
Pali: Pañca puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti. Cattāro puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:29.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:30.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Cattāro puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:31.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:32.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Aṭṭha puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:33.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:34.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Aṭṭha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:35.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:36.1
Pali: Satta puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Dve puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:37.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:38.1
Pali: Aggamaggasamaṅgī aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti. Dve puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:39.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānāti so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:40.1
Pali: Satta puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānanti, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Dve puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānanti aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:41.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānātīti? Āmantā. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.5:42.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:43.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te domanassindriyaṁ nappajahanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Aṭṭha puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:44.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.5:45.1
Pali: Anāgāmimaggasamaṅgī anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahati. Aṭṭha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti domanassindriyañca nappajahanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.5:46.1

English: 

ya10.3.5:47.1

English: 

ya10.3.5:48.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahatīti? Āmantā. 
English:

ya10.3.6:0.1
Pali: 10 Indriyayamaka 
English: 

ya10.3.6:0.2
Pali: 10.3 Pariññāvāra 
English: 

ya10.3.6:0.3
Pali: 10.3.6. Atītānāgatavāra 
English: 

ya10.3.6:1.0
Pali: 10.3.6.1. Anuloma 
English: 

ya10.3.6:1.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānittha so domanassindriyaṁ pajahissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:2.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ pajahissati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:3.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:4.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:5.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānittha so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:6.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:7.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ parijānittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:8.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so cakkhundriyaṁ parijānitthāti? No. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:9.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:10.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahitthāti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:11.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:12.1
Pali: Dve puggalā domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Anāgāmī domanassindriyañca pajahittha aññindriyañca bhāvessati. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:13.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:14.1
Pali: Cha puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha. Anāgāmī aññindriyañca bhāvessati domanassindriyañca pajahittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:15.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:16.1
Pali: Arahā domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati. Dve puggalā domanassindriyañca pajahittha aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:17.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so domanassindriyaṁ pajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:18.1
Pali: Cha puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ pajahittha. Dve puggalā aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti domanassindriyañca pajahittha. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:19.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha so aññindriyaṁ bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:20.1
Pali: Dve puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti. Pañca puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvittha aññindriyañca bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:21.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ bhāvessati. So anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:22.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ bhāvessanti no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha. Pañca puggalā aññindriyañca bhāvessanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:23.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:24.1
Pali: Arahā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati. Cha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvittha aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:25.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:26.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ bhāvittha. Cha puggalā aññātāvindriyañca sacchikarissanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca bhāvittha. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:27.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ bhāvittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissatīti? No. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:28.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ sacchikarissati so aññindriyaṁ bhāvitthāti? No. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:29.0
Pali: 10.3.6.2. Paccanīka 
English: 

ya10.3.6:29.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:30.1
Pali: Pañca puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissanti. Cattāro puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:31.1
Pali: Yo vā pana domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:32.1
Pali: Arahā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahissati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha. Cattāro puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahissanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:33.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:34.1

English: 

ya10.3.6:35.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:36.1
Pali: Arahā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha. Aṭṭha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:37.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:38.1
Pali: Satta puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Dve puggalā cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:39.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:40.1
Pali: Arahā aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha. Dve puggalā aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:41.1
Pali: Yo cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:42.1
Pali: Aṭṭha puggalā cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:43.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:44.1
Pali: Arahā aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati, no ca cakkhundriyaṁ na parijānittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti cakkhundriyañca na parijānittha. (Cakkhundriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:45.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:46.1
Pali: Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ paṭilabhissanti te domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Cha puggalā domanassindriyañca nappajahittha anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:47.1
Pali: Yo vā pana anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:48.1
Pali: Tayo puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha. Cha puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvessanti domanassindriyañca nappajahittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:49.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:50.1
Pali: Cha puggalā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te domanassindriyañca nappajahittha aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:51.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:52.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti domanassindriyañca nappajahittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:53.1
Pali: Yo domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:54.1
Pali: Cha puggalā domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te domanassindriyañca nappajahittha aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:55.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so domanassindriyaṁ nappajahitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:56.1
Pali: Arahā aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati, no ca domanassindriyaṁ nappajahittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti domanassindriyañca nappajahittha. (Domanassindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:57.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:58.1
Pali: Dve puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvittha aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:59.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:60.1
Pali: Dve puggalā aññindriyaṁ na bhāvessanti, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññindriyañca na bhāvessanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvittha. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:61.1
Pali: Yo anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:62.1
Pali: Dve puggalā anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvittha aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:63.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:64.1
Pali: Arahā aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati, no ca anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ na bhāvittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti anaññātaññassāmītindriyañca na bhāvittha. (Anaññātaññassāmītindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:65.1
Pali: Yo aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha so aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissatīti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:66.1
Pali: Aṭṭha puggalā aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha, no ca aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissanti. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññindriyañca na bhāvittha aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:67.1
Pali: Yo vā pana aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati so aññindriyaṁ na bhāvitthāti? 
English: 

ya10.3.6:68.1
Pali: Arahā aññātāvindriyaṁ na sacchikarissati, no ca aññindriyaṁ na bhāvittha. Ye puthujjanā maggaṁ na paṭilabhissanti te aññātāvindriyañca na sacchikarissanti aññindriyañca na bhāvittha. (Aññindriyamūlakaṁ.) 
English: 

ya10.3.6:69.1
Pali: Pariññāvāro. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:70.1
Pali: Indriyayamakapāḷi niṭṭhitā. 
English: 

ya10.3.6:71.1
Pali: Yamakapakaraṇaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English:
